PROJECTS.SINGH_DESC: This project uses only HTML and CSS, includes Google Fonts and various animations that give the website a modern and attractive look.

PROJECTS.SINGH_developer: Building responsive and interactive web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Angular with a focus on performance and user experience.
PROJECTS.SINGH_desing: User-centered interface (UI) and user experience (UX) design through wireframes, prototypes, information architecture, and visual design development

HOTEL.DESC: This project is a hotel booking web application built using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. The design incorporates Google Fonts and various animation effects. Data is retrieved from a database, allowing room filtering, booking, and detailed viewing of each room. Users can navigate hotels and book their desired room. Booked rooms are displayed on the “Booked Rooms” page, where they can be viewed or canceled. After authentication, the user moves from the “Home” page to the “Hotel” section, where they can fully use the system’s functionality.
HOTEL.MORE: To view the website in detail, you can click on the image or visit GitHub.

SHOP_PROJECT.DESC: This project uses HTML, CSS, and Angular. Google Fonts are integrated into the project. It is an online store website where users can purchase mobile phones or laptops. To make a purchase, users are required to complete a registration process. The website also allows product filtering, and to view the detailed description of a specific product, users need to click on the product name.

restoran.res: The project is built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It features modern animations and integrates Google Fonts. The website represents a restaurant platform where users can browse and purchase food. Registration is required to complete the payment process. Product filtering functionality is also available.
